action: Bind GitHub OIDC JOSE headers to an application-owned algorithm and key-compatibility policy before signature verification.

progress.finding: Fresh JWKS selection must be followed by a deny-by-default JOSE header gate that enforces an application algorithm allowlist, exact kid/alg/kty/use/key_ops compatibility, explicit token typing, and rejection of remote key indirection or unsupported critical headers.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical files

handoff: Infrastructure verifiers should compose bounded JWKS retrieval -> freshness -> unique key selection -> JOSE header policy -> cryptographic signature verification -> issuer/audience/time/run authorization. Policy acceptance is not signature verification or authorization.
